\caption{Prespecified headline at $\alpha{=}{-}3$ (operational direction): per (model, pole) cell, net-pairwise preference for the two case-agnostic variants $\textbf{CB}=\texttt{case\_blind}$ and $\textbf{CA}=\texttt{case\_aware}$.
